---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What outcome should this enable?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the workflow, role, adapter, or policy behavior you want.

## Why It Matters

What problem does it solve?

## Scope

What should be included?

## Non-Goals

What should not be included?

## Compatibility

Does this affect workflow templates, schemas, opencode adapter behavior, LLM providers, or policy replay?
